name: callflow
description: Desktop call logging assistant for call center operators.

scripts.check: node --check src/main/main.js && node --check src/main/preload.js && node --check src/main/storage-service.js && node --check src/shared/validators.js && node --check src/shared/reports.js && node --check src/shared/reminders.js && node --check src/shared/stats.js && node --check src/renderer/scripts/core/settings.js && node --check src/renderer/scripts/core/timezones.js && node --check src/renderer/scripts/core/markdown.js && node --check src/renderer/scripts/core/recurrence.js && node --check src/renderer/scripts/core/timers.js && node --check src/renderer/scripts/app.js && node --check src/renderer/scripts/storage.js && node --check src/renderer/scripts/i18n.js
scripts.validate: npm run check && npm test && npm run lint

author: GaboEI
